div.h2: Ahadu Bank S.C - Employee Payroll Sheet
div.p:
Branch:
Multiple Branches ()
Head Office
| Batch:

t.t-value: [('CL_STAFF', 'PAYMENT OF SALARY FOR CLERICAL STAFFS'), ('NON_CL', 'PAYMENT OF SALARY FOR NON CLERICAL STAFFS'), ('OTHER', 'PAYMENT OF SALARY FOR OTHER STAFFS')]
o.slip_ids.filtered(lambda s: s.employee_id.ahadu_employee_type_id.code == sec[0] if sec[0] != 'OTHER' else s.employee_id.ahadu_employee_type_id.code not in ['CL_STAFF', 'NON_CL'])

span.t-esc: sum_full_basic + sum_transport + sum_representation + sum_housing + sum_hardship + (sum_cash_ind_to_bal + sum_cash_ind_to_sal) + sum_mobile + sum_other_ben + sum_lop_adj + sum_pension_comp + sum_ot

sum_tax + sum_pension_emp + sum_pension_comp + sum_cost_sharing + sum_net + sum_adv_loan + sum_pers_loan + sum_savings + sum_credit_assoc + sum_penalty + sum_lop_leave + sum_other_ded + sum_cash_ind_to_bal + sum_cash_ind_to_sal
